title: xanthoxerampellia phaeoglossa
intro:
Xanthoxerampellia phaeoglossa is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as a flowering plant. 
It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. 
The health benefits of Xanthoxerampellia phaeoglossa include reducing inflammation and fighting infections, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. 
Traditional herbal preparations often involve the plant's leaves or roots being dried and then made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
